status: Stable - CSV import working well with real BscScan data. New Reports search added.
data_strategy: Primary data source is raw BscScan transaction export CSV. No live blockchain fetching. Demo data is used only as fallback on first load.
current_focus: Real attendance data from BscScan CSV imports. Period Summary correctly pairs ClockIn → ClockOut events. New Reports page lets managers search a single employee (by name or wallet) and pull their full clock-in/out history.
key_decisions: overtimeMinutes and lat/lng are set to 0 on CSV import (worked time is calculated client-side via pairing)
Mappings and logs are persisted in localStorage
Employee display name comes from WalletMapping
New Reports.jsx added at route /reports for per-employee search + full session history
Session pairing logic extracted to src/utils/sessionPairing.js for reuse by Reports.jsx (LogsView.jsx still has its own inline copy pending a future refactor to share one source of truth)
known_limitations: Imported records have latitude/longitude = 0 (no geo data from transaction CSV)
Individual ClockOut rows show 0 overtime (calculated in Period Summary instead)
Demo data mixes with real data until user clears logs
Pairing logic is duplicated between LogsView.jsx and src/utils/sessionPairing.js until refactored
last_major_change: Added Reports.jsx: search employees by name or wallet, filter by date range, view total worked/overtime hours, current status, full session table, and export that employee's report as CSV.
